name: Spicy Turkey Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in melted butter or margarine until softened.
2. Stir in ground turkey, egg, and bread crumbs. Combine seasonings and add to the turkey mix.
3. Shape into a loaf and place in a pan. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Cover with tin foil and bake at 350°F (180°C) for 1 hour.
5. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Serve hot or cold, seasoned to taste.
